title: croton oligandrus
intro: Croton oligandrus, also known as the Indian croton or picture plant, is a type of flowering plant native to India and other parts of Asia. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is known to provide various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and aiding in digestion. Herbal preparations of Croton oligandrus include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
